summary: Tested Attendance Module improvements: new 'faltou_sem_aviso' status, search by player name, unavailabilities endpoint, my/detailed with can_edit flag, edit restrictions after event start, and RBAC visibility. Fixed bug where players could see all team attendance data. All 18 backend tests pass, all frontend UI elements verified.

fixed.issue: Players could see all team members' attendance data instead of only their own
fixed.fix: Added filter for is_player to only return own attendance records

tests: Player search only returns own data (RBAC)
Returns correct structure (id, user_id, start_date, end_date, reason)
Each record has can_edit and event_started flags
Player cannot edit attendance after event started (403)
Admin can edit attendance after event started (200)
Admin sees all team attendance (8+ players)
Player sees only own attendance (1 record)
Family member sees only linked player's attendance
Unavailabilities button visible with badge count
S/ Aviso column in attendance table
All 4 filter dropdowns present (team, season, month, event type)

critical_code_review_comments: RBAC visibility bug fixed: Players now only see their own attendance data in GET /api/teams/{id}/attendance
can_edit flag correctly computed based on event_started and user role (admin/coach can always edit)
faltou_sem_aviso status properly integrated in AttendanceStatus Literal type
Search endpoint respects RBAC - players can only search their own data
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added player filter in get_team_attendance endpoint (line 3121-3126)
/app/backend/tests/test_attendance_features.py - New test file for attendance features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance module fully tested. RBAC visibility bug was found and fixed - players were seeing all team attendance data. Now players only see their own data. All new features working: faltou_sem_aviso status, search by player name, unavailabilities display, can_edit flag based on event start time, edit restrictions for players after event start.

verified_attendance_features.edit_restriction: Players blocked after event_started=True, coaches/admin allowed
